---
title: Pokemon Average Attributes by Type
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
targets::tar_load(attrs_by_type)
source(here::here("R/visualization.R"))

attrs <- setdiff(x = names(attrs_by_type), y = "type")
chosen_attr <- sample(attrs, size = 1)

make_barchat(attrs_by_type, col = chosen_attr)
```
